data.name: Hentai Puzzler
data.detailed_description:
Hentai Puzzler is a relaxing NSFW puzzle game offering the ability to create, store, and play custom puzzle sets:

  • After selecting play or custom game you can choose between 3 levels of difficulty to start solving puzzles!

  • You can use the gallery to both view your completed puzzles up close, and find out how many puzzles you have left to unlock:

  • Get lost in the sauce completing puzzles, creating custom games from your own images, and unlocking gallery photos to gaze at!

  • Enjoy!

data.short_description: Hentai Puzzler is a relaxing NSFW puzzle game offering the ability to create, store, and play custom puzzle sets. With 40 sexy high-quality women to start you off you'll be on to making your own puzzles in no time!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

data.legal_notice:
This game is a work of fiction. All characters or associations are a product of author's imagination; names, characters, places and incidents either are products of the author’s imagination or are used fictitiously. Any resemblance to other products or people (living or dead) or places is entirely coincidental.

Every appearing character is over 18 years old.
